scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm -w apps/api run start:dev" "npm -w apps/web run dev"
scripts.lint: npm -w apps/api run lint && npm -w apps/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w apps/api run typecheck && npm -w apps/web run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w apps/api run test && npm -w apps/web run test
